name: @aily-project/lib-taojingchi-stm32
nickname: 淘晶驰串口屏驱动库(STM32专用)
nickname_zh_cn: 淘晶驰串口屏驱动库(STM32专用)

description: 淘晶驰串口屏STM32专用驱动库，支持硬件串口快速选择（Serial1/Serial2），无需软串口
description_zh_cn: 淘晶驰串口屏STM32专用驱动库，支持硬件串口快速选择（Serial1/Serial2），无需软串口
description_en: STM32-specific Taojingchi serial screen driver with hardware serial quick selection (Serial1/Serial2), no SoftwareSerial needed
